title: Claude Team Plan for Research Labs
description: Anthropic offers a grant-funded discounted Claude Team plan designed for eligible academic and nonprofit scientific research laboratories.
eligibility: Active scientific labs at academic institutions and nonprofit research organizations may qualify after verification by the lab's principal investigator; smaller labs can self-verify online.
value: Discounted Claude Team plans from $15 per user per month, with research tools and shared administration
regions: Global, subject to verification and service availability
